API Endpoints Reference

/api/users—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for users
/api/roles—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for roles
/api/permissions—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for permissions
/api/products—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for products
/api/categories—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for categories
/api/posts—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for posts
/api/tasks—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for tasks
/api/orders—GET, POST, PUT, DELETE CRUD for orders
